original_hypothesis.title: Admin Rug Pull via Unrestricted withdraw Function
original_hypothesis.hypothesis_description: The owner can call the withdraw function to drain all TITN and TGT from the contract, leaving users with no ability to claim or recover funds.
original_hypothesis.investigation_rationale: The withdraw function has no restrictions on which tokens can be withdrawn or how much, completely breaking the trust model and solvency invariant.
original_hypothesis.config_evidence: MergeTgt.sol withdraw function has no restrictions.

proof_of_signal.pattern: Owner can withdraw any token including deposited TITN

initial_operational_evidence.suspicious_workflow: withdraw function allows arbitrary token extraction

operational_questions: Is there a timelock or multisig?
validation_requirements: Verify admin can drain TITN and TGT

preliminary_attack_methodology.phase_1: Admin key is compromised or admin turns malicious
preliminary_attack_methodology.phase_4: Contract is drained, users cannot claim or recover funds

validation_result.impact_summary: Filtered before validation: attack_realism is LOW
validation_result.detailed_analysis: This hypothesis was auto-rejected because its attack_realism grade is LOW. Preconditions require actions outside the attacker's control (off-chain compromise, victim cooperation, or admin collusion). No LLM validation was performed.
